info.name: Subjects
info.description: Subject listing, enrollment, and per-subject discovery endpoints (members / contributors / question sets / leaderboard).

request.description:
List subjects with optional filters and aggregate counts.

**Query params:**
- `college` *(optional)* — filter by college
- `academic_year` *(optional)* — 1–7
- `page` — default 1
- `size` — default 20, max 100

**Returns:** `SubjectListResponse` (200) — each item includes `member_count`, `published_question_set_count`, `question_count`.

List subjects the authenticated user is enrolled in.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Returns:** `SubjectListResponse` (200)

Retrieve a single subject by ID. Includes aggregate counts.

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Returns:** `SubjectResponse` (200) with `member_count`, `published_question_set_count`, `question_count`.

Enroll the authenticated user in a subject.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Returns:** `EnrollmentResponse` (201)

Remove the authenticated user's enrollment from a subject.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Returns:** 204 No Content

Paginated list of users enrolled in a subject. Drives the Members tab on Subject Detail.

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Returns:** `SubjectMemberListResponse` (200) — each item: `user_id`, `full_name`, `college`, `academic_year`, `enrolled_at`.

Top users in the subject ranked by published question-set count.

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Query params:**
- `limit` — 1–50, default 10

**Returns:** `list[SubjectContributorResponse]` (200) — `user_id`, `full_name`, `question_set_count`.

All published question sets in this subject. Drives the Question Sets tab on Subject Detail.

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Returns:** `SubjectPublishedSetListResponse` (200) — each item: `id`, `title`, `question_count`, `created_at`.

Top users in the subject by composite score = `correct_answers·10 + contributions·50`.

**Requires:** Bearer token

**Path params:**
- `subject_id` — UUID

**Query params:**
- `limit` — 1–50, default 10

**Returns:** `list[SubjectLeaderboardEntry]` (200) — `user_id`, `full_name`, `completed_quizzes`, `accuracy_avg` (0..1), `contributions`, `score`.
